metaData.Key Information:
• Clinically tested on Asian hair for hot and humid climate
• Deeply cleanses oily scalp
• 48 hour of scalp and hair freshness
• Relieves scalp irritation
• Eliminates scalp sebum odour
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Apply 1 - 2 pumps to wet hair
2. Add some water to create a rich lather and massage through hair
3. Rinse thoroughly
4. Follow with Extra Fresh & Hydrate Treatment
5. For intense scalp care, complete with Extra Fresh Scalp Essence
• Caution:
1. Avoid contact with eyes and if it does, rinse immediately
2. Do not use when scalp is red, inflamed, infected, irritated or painful
3. Should you experience irritation, discontinue use and consult a dermatologist
